zh.Bashall Eaves, Lancashire, England, Unit: 英國英格蘭越可爾巴沙拉爾 伊夫斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edmund Talbot於大約1260年出生在英國越可爾巴沙拉爾 伊夫斯時，他的父親Thomas I TALBOT of Bashall Eaves, Gov of Clitheroe Castle31歲，母親Mathea of Yorkshire28歲。他於大約1304年與Joan de Holland在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他於1309年登記服兵役。他去世於大約1310年享年52歲。

zh-hans.Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾巴沙拉爾 伊夫斯
zh-hans.Bashall Eaves, Lancashire, England, Unit: 英国英格兰越可爾巴沙拉爾 伊夫斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Edmund Talbot于大约1260年出生在英国越可爾巴沙拉爾 伊夫斯时，他的父亲Thomas I TALBOT of Bashall Eaves, Gov of Clitheroe Castle31岁，母亲Mathea of Yorkshire28岁。他于大约1304年与Joan de Holland在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他于1309年登记服兵役。他去世于大约1310年享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Talbot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Marcel, Anatole, Armand, Aubert, Camille, Gilles, Normand, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Auguste.
English and Irish (of Norman origin); French: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Talebot, a pet form of Old French Talebert, Talbert (see Talbert 1). Compare Talbert 2.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Talbald, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + bald ‘bold’.

variants.name: Talbert
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin); French: from the Old French personal name Talebert, Talbert, from ancient Germanic Talaberht or Dalbert, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + berht ‘bright’.
Altered form of English   Talbot  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Talbott
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Talbot  .

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edmund Talbot was born about 1260, in Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England, his father, Thomas I TALBOT of Bashall Eaves, Gov of Clitheroe Castle, was 31 and his mother, Mathea of Yorkshire, was 28. He married Joan de Holland about 1304, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He registered for military service in 1309. He died about 1310, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edmund Talbot est né environ 1260, à Bashall Eaves, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Thomas I TALBOT of Bashall Eaves, Gov of Clitheroe Castle, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Mathea of Yorkshire, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Holland environ 1304, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1309. Il est décédé environ 1310, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.Bashall Eaves, Lancashire, England, Unit: Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Edmund Talbot um 1260 in Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas I TALBOT of Bashall Eaves, Gov of Clitheroe Castle 31 und seine Mutter Mathea of Yorkshire 28. Er hat um 1304 in England, United Kingdom Joan de Holland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er hat sich 1309 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb um 1310 im Alter von 52 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edmund Talbot è nato il circa 1260 nel Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas I TALBOT of Bashall Eaves, Gov of Clitheroe Castle, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Mathea of Yorkshire, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Holland circa 1304, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1309. Morì circa 1310, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア

ja.Bashall Eaves, Lancashire, England, Unit: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアバシャル エエイベス
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund Talbotが約1260年にイギリスヨークシュアイアバシャル エエイベスで生まれた時，父Thomas I TALBOT of Bashall Eaves, Gov of Clitheroe Castleは31歳，母Mathea of Yorkshireは28歳であった。約1304年にイギリスイギリスでJoan de Hollandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1309年に兵役登録をした。彼は約1310年に52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund Talbot(이)가 대략 1260년 영국 요르크실르 배샤 이브스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas I TALBOT of Bashall Eaves, Gov of Clitheroe Castle(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathea of Yorkshire(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1304년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Joan de Holland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1309년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 대략 1310년 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edmund Talbot nasceu aproximadamente 1260, em Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas I TALBOT of Bashall Eaves, Gov of Clitheroe Castle, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Mathea of Yorkshire, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Holland aproximadamente 1304, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1309. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1310, com 52 anos.

ro.Bashall Eaves, Lancashire, England, Unit: Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edmund Talbot родился около 1260 г. в местности башолл эавесь, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas I TALBOT of Bashall Eaves, Gov of Clitheroe Castle было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mathea of Yorkshire, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Holland около 1304 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. В 1309 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер около 1310 г. в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Edmund Talbot nació aproximadamente 1260, en Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas I TALBOT of Bashall Eaves, Gov of Clitheroe Castle, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Mathea of Yorkshire, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Joan de Holland aproximadamente 1304, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1309. Murió aproximadamente 1310, a la edad de 52 años.
